combat-offense.name: Combat (Attack & Damage)
combat-offense.description: Feats that improve your ability to hit enemies and deal damage

combat-defense.name: Combat (Defense & Mobility)
combat-defense.description: Feats that improve your defenses and battlefield movement

force.name: Force
force.description: Feats that enhance Force powers and Force-related abilities

utility.name: Utility (Skills & Social)
utility.description: Feats that improve skills, social interactions, and versatility

recovery.name: Recovery (Survival & Resilience)
recovery.description: Feats that improve survivability and saving throws

Weapon Focus.summary: +1 bonus on attack rolls with chosen weapon.

Greater Weapon Focus.summary: You gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls with the selected weapon group.

Weapon Specialization.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls with the selected weapon group.

Greater Weapon Specialization.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls with the selected weapon group.

Triple Crit.summary: Deal triple damage on a Critical Hit.

Triple Crit Specialist.summary: When you score a critical hit with the selected weapon group, you deal triple damage and move the target -1 step down the condition track.

Power Attack.summary: Trade attack bonus for damage on melee attacks (up to your Base Attack Bonus).

Hew.summary: When you use Power Attack, you ignore an amount of damage reduction equal to your base attack bonus.

Cleave.summary: Extra melee attack after dropping target.

Bantha Rush.summary: Push opponent 1 square after making a successful melee attack.

Two-Weapon Fighting.summary: You reduce the penalty for fighting with two weapons by 2.

Dual Weapon Mastery I.summary: Take a -5 penalty on attacks when attacking with two weapons, or both ends of a double weapon.

Dual Weapon Mastery II.summary: Take a -2 penalty on attacks when attacking with two weapons, or both ends of a double weapon.

Dual Weapon Mastery III.summary: Take no penalty on attacks when attacking with two weapons, or both ends of a double weapon.

Point Blank Shot.summary: +1 bonus on ranged attacks and damage against foes within Point-Blank Range.

Precise Shot.summary: No -5 penalty for shooting into melee.

Far Shot.summary: Range penalties for Short-, Medium-, and Long-ranged attacks are reduced.

Deadeye.summary: If you Aim, deal extra damage.

Charging Fire.summary: Make ranged attack at end of a Charge; take a -2 penalty to Reflex Defense.

Sniper.summary: You ignore Soft Cover when making a ranged attack.

Autofire Assault.summary: Decrease penalty on Autofire attack and inflict extra damage when sustaining fire in the same squares in consecutive rounds.

Friendly Fire Avoidance.summary: You may choose to exclude a number of squares equal to your Dexterity modifier from the area of effect of your autofire attacks.

Double Attack.summary: Make an extra attack with chosen weapon during Full Attack, -5 penalty to all attacks.

Rapid Shot.summary: Take a -2 penalty on a ranged attack roll to deal +1 die of damage.

Rapid Strike.summary: Take a -2 penalty on a melee attack roll to deal +1 die of damage.

Improved Disarm.summary: Gain +5 bonus on melee attacks to Disarm an opponent.

Improved Grapple.summary: You gain a +5 bonus on grapple checks and do not provoke attacks of opportunity when initiating a grapple.

Pin.summary: Grappled opponent is Pinned for one round, can't move, and and loses its Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense.

Knock Prone.summary: You may attempt to knock an opponent prone with a melee attack.

Improved Knock Prone.summary: You gain a +5 bonus on attack rolls made to knock an opponent prone.

Improved Stun.summary: You gain a +5 bonus on attack rolls made to stun an opponent.

Acrobatic Strike.summary: Gain +2 competence bonus on next attack against opponent you Tumble past.

Grappling Strike.summary: When you hit with a melee attack, you may initiate a grapple as a free action without provoking an attack of opportunity.

Staggering Attack.summary: Once per encounter, you may move a target -1 step down the condition track when you hit with a melee attack.

Stunning Strike.summary: Once per encounter, you may move a target -1 step down the condition track when you hit with a melee attack.

Wounding Strike.summary: Once per encounter, you may move a target -1 step down the condition track when you hit with a melee attack.

Assured Attack.summary: Reroll the lowest damage die when making a successful attack.

Mighty Swing.summary: Spend two Swift Actions to deal extra damage in melee.

Lucky Shot.summary: Once per encounter, you may reroll a ranged attack roll and take the better result.

Savage Attack.summary: Add +1 die of damage when successful on a Full Attack.

Reckless Charge.summary: When you charge, you gain a +2 bonus on melee attack rolls but take a -2 penalty to Reflex Defense until the start of your next turn.

Dodge.summary: Gain a +1 dodge bonus to Reflex Defense against a selected target.

Mobility.summary: Gain +5 dodge bonus to Reflex Defense against some Attacks of Opportunity.

Spring Attack.summary: When making a melee attack, you may move both before and after the attack, up to your speed, without provoking attacks of opportunity from the target.

Whirlwind Attack.summary: Make one melee attack against each opponent within reach.

Elusive Target.summary: When fighting defensively or using the total defense action, you may redirect missed melee attacks to another target adjacent to you.

Burst of Speed.summary: Move Speed twice as Move Action.

Mobile Fighting.summary: You may move up to your speed when using the withdraw action, and you gain a +2 bonus to Reflex Defense against attacks of opportunity provoked by movement.

Hard Target.summary: You gain a +2 bonus to Reflex Defense against ranged attacks while moving at least 2 squares on your turn.

Running Attack.summary: Move before and after making an attack.

Melee Defense.summary: Trade attack bonus on melee attacks for a dodge bonus to Reflex Defense.

Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons).summary: You are proficient with simple weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

Weapon Proficiency (Pistols).summary: You are proficient with pistols and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

Weapon Proficiency (Rifles).summary: You are proficient with rifles and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

Weapon Proficiency (Heavy Weapons).summary: You are proficient with heavy weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

Advanced Melee Weapon Proficiency.summary: You are proficient with advanced melee weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

Heavy Weapon Proficiency.summary: You are proficient with heavy weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

Force Sensitivity.summary: You can make Use the Force checks and gain access to Force Talents.

Force Training.summary: Learn a number of Force Powers equal to 1 + your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1).

Force Boon.summary: Gain three additional Force Points at each level.

Force Focus.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate a specific Force power you select when taking this feat.

Block.summary: Use the Force to negate a melee attack while wielding a lightsaber.

Deflect.summary: Use the Force to negate a ranged attack while wielding a lightsaber.

Redirect Shot.summary: When you successfully negate a ranged attack with Deflect, you may redirect the shot to another target within line of sight.

Saber Throw.summary: You may throw your lightsaber as a ranged attack using Use the Force instead of a ranged attack roll.

Crush.summary: Deal Unarmed or Claw damage to a Pinned opponent.

Forceful Grip.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Force Grip.

Forceful Blast.summary: Move a target damaged by your Grenade attack.

Forceful Slam.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Force Slam.

Forceful Strike.summary: You may spend a Force Point to move a target -1 step down the condition track when using Force Stun.

Forceful Stun.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Force Stun.

Forceful Telekinesis.summary: You may spend a Force Point to move a target -1 step down the condition track when using Move Object.

Forceful Throw.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Move Object.

Battle Meditation.summary: Bolster allies through the Force and coordinate them in battle.

Forceful Vitality.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Endurance checks and may reroll a failed Endurance check once per encounter.

Forceful Will.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against mind-affecting effects and may reroll a failed Will Defense check once per encounter.

Forceful Recovery.summary: Regain one Force Power when you catch a Second Wind.

Forceful Warrior.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on melee attack rolls made while using a Force power.

Forceful Weapon.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Battle Strike.

Forceful Saber Throw.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Saber Throw.

Fast Surge.summary: Catch a Second Wind as a Free Action on your turn.

Force Regimen Mastery.summary: Learn a number of Force Regimens equal to 1 + your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1).

Unstoppable Force.summary: Gain a +5 bonus to Fortitude Defense and Will Defense against any effect requiring a Use the Force check.

Intuitive Initiative.summary: You may reroll your Initiative check and take the better result.

Keen Force Mind.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate mind-affecting Force powers.

Skill Focus.summary: Gain +5 competence bonus on Skill Checks with one Trained Skill.

Skill Training.summary: You become Trained in one Class Skill.

Linguist.summary: Gain bonus Languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1).

Fast Talk.summary: You may make a Persuasion check to feint in combat as a swift action instead of a standard action.

Intimidating Presence.summary: You may use Persuasion to intimidate as a swift action instead of a standard action.

Trustworthy.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Persuasion checks and may reroll a failed Persuasion check once per encounter.

Natural Leader.summary: You become the leader of an Organization.

Coordinated Attack.summary: Automatic success with Aid Another action at Point-Blank Range.

Frightful Presence.summary: As a standard action, you may make a Persuasion check to intimidate all enemies within 6 squares.

Frightening Presence.summary: When you use Frightful Presence, targets that fail their Will Defense check move -2 steps down the condition track instead of -1.

Tech Specialist.summary: You can make custom modifications to Armor, Weapons, Vehicles, Droids, and Devices.

Jack of All Trades.summary: Make untrained skill checks more reliably across a wide range of tasks.

Adaptable Talent.summary: Temporarily gain access to an additional Talent.

Resilient Talent.summary: Once per day, you may gain the benefit of any talent from a class you have levels in for 1 minute.

Toughness.summary: Gain +1 Hit Point per Character Level.

Great Fortitude.summary: You gain a +2 bonus to your Fortitude Defense.

Lightning Reflexes.summary: You gain a +2 bonus to your Reflex Defense.

Conditioned.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Endurance checks and may reroll a failed Endurance check once per encounter.

Headstrong.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against fear effects and may reroll a failed Will Defense check once per encounter.

Delay Damage.summary: Once per encounter, you may delay the effects of damage taken until the end of your next turn.

Indomitable Will.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against mind-affecting effects and may reroll a failed Will Defense check once per encounter.

Resilient Strength.summary: Use Strength or Constitution to determine Fortitude Defense.

Resilient Reflexes.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Reflex Defense against effects that target Dexterity and may reroll a failed check once per encounter.

Resilient Will.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against effects that target Wisdom and may reroll a failed check once per encounter.

Quick Draw.summary: Draw weapon as a Swift Action.

Weapon Finesse.summary: Use Dexterity modifier instead of Strength modifier on attack rolls with Light Melee Weapons and Lightsabers.

Noble Fencing Style.summary: When wielding a weapon with Weapon Finesse, you may use your Charisma modifier instead of Strength for attack rolls.

Reactive Stealth.summary: Once per encounter, you may reroll a Stealth check and take the better result.

Reactive Awareness.summary: Once per encounter, you may reroll a Perception check and take the better result.

Surgical Precision.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Treat Injury checks and may reroll a failed check once per encounter.

Mounted Combat.summary: Increase Speed and avoid attacks when riding a Mount.

Vehicular Combat.summary: Negate one attack per round against the Vehicle you're piloting.

Stealthy.summary: You gain a +2 bonus on Stealth checks and may reroll a failed Stealth check once per encounter.

Low Profile.summary: You gain cover from enemies at long range and may reroll Stealth checks made to avoid detection.

Desperate Gambit.summary: Reroll missed attack by taking a -2 penalty (or -5 for Natural 1) to Reflex Defense.

Starship Tactics.summary: You are trained to make use of Starship Maneuvers and are skilled at space combat.

Burst Fire.summary: Take a -5 penalty on an Autofire attack to gain +2 dice of damage.

Careful Shot.summary: If you Aim, gain +1 bonus on the attack roll.

Cybernetic Surgery.summary: Install a Cybernetic Prosthesis onto a living being.

Dreadful Rage.summary: Rage bonus to attacks and damage increases to +5.

Exotic Weapon Proficiency.summary: Wield an Exotic Weapon without penalty.

Extra Rage.summary: Rage one additional time per day.

Extra Second Wind.summary: Gain an additional Second Wind per day.

Great Cleave.summary: No limit to Cleave attacks each round.

Improved Charge.summary: You can Charge without moving in a straight line.

Martial Arts I.summary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.

Martial Arts II.summary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.

Martial Arts III.summary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.

Point-Blank Shot.summary: +1 bonus on ranged attacks and damage against foes within Point-Blank Range.

Powerful Charge.summary: Gain +2 bonus on your attack roll while Charging, and deal extra damage.

Shake It Off.summary: Spend two Swift Actions to move +1 step along the Condition Track.

Strong in the Force.summary: Roll d8s instead of d6s when you spend a Force Point.

Surgical Expertise.summary: You can perform Surgery in 10 minutes instead of 1 hour.

Throw.summary: Throw a Grappled opponent up to 1 square beyond your reach and deal damage.

Trip.summary: Trip an opponent that you've Grappled, knocking it Prone.

Triple Attack.summary: Make second extra attack with chosen weapon during Full Attack, additional -5 penalty to all attacks.

Weapon Proficiency.summary: Ignore -5 penalty on attack rolls with weapons of a particular type.

Starship Designer.summary: You are trained to design (and redesign) Starships.

Tactical Genius.summary: You are a master at using multiple starship tactics over the course of long space combats.

A Few Maneuvers.summary: You can weave, juke, and roll to avoid enemy fire in the thick of combat.

Momentum Strike.summary: You know how to put the weight of your momentum into attacks while riding a Mount or Speeder Bike.

Mounted Defense.summary: You are able to react to incoming attacks, using you Mount or Speeder Bike to absorb attacks against you.

Suppression Fire.summary: You can lay down a hail of blaster fire to pin your opponents.

Accelerated Strike.summary: Once per encounter, make a Full Attack as a Standard Action.

Conditioning.summary: Reroll Strength and Constitution based Skill Checks.

Critical Strike.summary: Increase critical threat range of an attack.

Echani Training.summary: You can double the damage bonus provided by your Strength modifier to Unarmed Attacks (minimum +1) provided you make only one Unarmed attack this turn.

Flurry.summary: Increases attack bonus, with penalties to Reflex Defense.

Force Readiness.summary: Spend Force Points even if it is not your turn.

Gearhead.summary: Make Mechanics and Use Computer checks quickly.

Implant Training.summary: You don't move additional steps down the Condition Track due to your Implants.

Improved Rapid Strike.summary: Trade -5 penalty on attack roll for +2 dice of damage when using a Light Melee Weapon.

Increased Agility.summary: Increase Climb Speed, Swim Speed, and Jump distance by 2 squares.

Logic Upgrade: Self-Defense.summary: Grant yourself +2 to the Defense of your choice for 1 round.

Logic Upgrade: Tactician.summary: Grant a +5 bonus to attack with a successful Aid Another attempt.

Mandalorian Training.summary: Gain a +2 bonus on attack rolls when using the Charging Fire feat.

Poison Resistance.summary: You are inherently more resistant to Poison.

Power Blast.summary: Trade attack bonus for damage on ranged attacks (up to your Base Attack Bonus).

Quick Skill.summary: Take 10 on Skill Checks when rushed, Take 20 in half of the normal time.

Republic Military Training.summary: When behind Cover, you can reduce the damage of an incoming attack.

Sith Military Training.summary: Upon debilitating an opponent, you can cause other opponents to lose heart.

Sniper Shot.summary: Increase accuracy at a -5 Reflex Defense penalty.

Tumble Defense.summary: Your martial ability makes it harder for opponents to Tumble past.

Withdrawal Strike.summary: Adjacent opponents can not use the Withdraw Action.

Advantageous Attack.summary: Add full Heroic Level to attacks against slower enemies.

Angled Throw.summary: Ignore Cover with Grenades and grenadelike weapons.

Bad Feeling.summary: Always have a Move Action during the Surprise Round.

Blaster Barrage.summary: Automatically Aid Another when using Autofire attacks.

Controlled Rage.summary: Enter Rage as a Free Action, and end Rage at will.

Crossfire.summary: Redirect missed attacks against Soft Cover.

Cunning Attack.summary: Gain +2 bonus on attack rolls against Flat-Footed enemies.

Focused Rage.summary: When Raging, use Skills that require patience at a -5 penalty.

Improved Bantha Rush.summary: Push foes away a number of squares equal to Strength modifier.

Informer.summary: Gather Information with Perception skill, and do it faster.

Mighty Throw.summary: Add Strength bonus to ranged attack rolls.

Powerful Rage.summary: Gain a +4 bonus on Strength checks and Strength-based Skill Checks.

Rapport.summary: Grant an additional +2 bonus when using the Aid Another action.

Recall.summary: Reroll Knowledge skill check, keeping the better result.

Strafe.summary: Attack multiple targets as you move past them.

Swarm.summary: Gain +1 bonus on melee attack rolls when allies are adjacent.

Collateral Damage.summary: Gain extra attack upon hitting the first target.

Cornered.summary: When unable to Withdraw, +2 on attacks.

Deadly Sniper.summary: Gain +2 bonus on your ranged attack roll and deal +1 die of damage.

Deceptive Drop.summary: Flat-Footed targets knocked Prone on Surprise Round.

Duck and Cover.summary: You dive for Cover when you avoid Area Attacks.

Fleet-Footed.summary: +2 Speed when making a Running Attack.

Friends in Low Places.summary: Reduce Black Market cost multiplier for Restricted Items by 1.

Hasty Modification.summary: Swap one Trait for another Trait.

Hideous Visage.summary: Deception check to push opponent away.

Impersonate.summary: Shapeshift to impersonate a specific person.

Impetuous Move.summary: Move when you catch a Second Wind.

Knife Trick.summary: Attack of Opportunity with concealed weapon to greater effect.

Lightning Draw.summary: Draw and fire as a Standard Action.

Opportunistic Retreat.summary: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to move at half speed.

Resurgence.summary: Gain bonus Move Action when you catch your Second Wind.

Slippery Maneuver.summary: Dodge two targets, Withdraw at full Speed.

Stay Up.summary: Move 1 step down Condition Track to reduce damage.

Tactical Advantage.summary: Make Attack of Opportunity and move 1 square.

Wicked Strike.summary: Gain extra attack on a second target upon damaging the first target.

Anointed Hunter.summary: Move 2 or more squares and gain a +1 bonus on attacks with Thrown Weapons until the end of your turn.

Artillery Shot.summary: You increase the efficiency of your Burst and Splash weapon attacks.

Coordinated Barrage.summary: Allow an ally to deal more damage when you aid their attack.

Droidcraft.summary: Repair a Droid in 10 minutes instead of 1 hour.

Droid Hunter.summary: Deal +2 damage to Droid enemies, or +4 when using an Ion Weapon.

Experienced Medic.summary: Perform Surgery on multiple creatures simultaneously.

Flash and Clear.summary: Gain Concealment against a target you damage with a Burst or Splash weapon.

Flood of Fire.summary: Ignore enemies' dodge and deflection bonus to Reflex Defense when making Area Attacks with a weapon set on Autofire.

Grand Army of the Republic Training.summary: Apply your armor's Equipment bonus to your Will Defense.

Gunnery Specialist.summary: Reroll an attack made with a Vehicle Weapon.

Jedi Familiarity.summary: Gain one temporary Force Point when targeted by an ally's Force Power or Force Talent.

Leader of Droids.summary: Allied Droids benefit from your beneficial Mind-Affecting effects.

Overwhelming Attack.summary: Any attempt to negate your attack takes a -5 penalty on the attack roll or Skill Check.

Pall of the Dark Side.summary: Add half your Dark Side Score to Use the Force checks to resist detection.

Separatist Military Training.summary: Gain a +1 bonus on an attack roll while adjacent to an ally.

Spray Shot.summary: When using a weapon set on Autofire, you can reduce the area to 1 square.

Trench Warrior.summary: When you have Cover against an enemy's ranged attacks, gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls against that enemy.

Unwavering Resolve.summary: Gain a +5 bonus to Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.

Wary Defender.summary: Gain a +2 bonus to Fortitude Defense and Will Defense while Fighting Defensively.

Attack Combo (Fire and Strike).summary: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks.

Attack Combo (Melee).summary: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed or melee attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed or melee attacks.

Attack Combo (Ranged).summary: Deal +1 die of damage on ranged attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two ranged attacks.

Autofire Sweep.summary: Sweep a wide area while using Autofire mode.

Biotech Specialist.summary: Make custom modifications to Yuuzhan Vong Biotech.

Biotech Surgery.summary: Install a Bio-Implant on a living being.

Brink of Death.summary: Attacks that would kill your enemy reduces them to 0 Hit Points instead.

Fatal Hit.summary: You automatically kill an enemy that you reduce to 0 Hit Points, and you can perform a Coup de Grace as a Standard Action.

Feat of Strength.summary: Take 10 or Take 20 on one Strength check or related Skill Check per encounter.

Galactic Alliance Military Training.summary: You do not move down the Condition Track the first time an attack exceeds your Damage Threshold.

Grapple Resistance.summary: Gain a +5 bonus to resist Grab and Grapple attacks.

Knock Heads.summary: You may knock two opponents' heads together after a successful Multi-Grab.

Multi-Grab.summary: You may Grab two opponents as a Standard Action.

Rancor Crush.summary: Move an enemy -1 step down the Condition Track when using the Crush feat.

Return Fire.summary: You may make a single ranged attack as a Reaction to a ranged attack against you that misses.

Returning Bug.summary: Thrown Razor Bugs and Thud Bugs return to your hand immediately.

Vehicle Systems Expertise.summary: Recharge Shields or Reroute Power on a Vehicle faster than normal.

Zero Range.summary: Gain a +1 bonus on your attack roll and deal +1 die of damage when making a ranged attack against an adjacent target or a target in your Fighting Space.

Follow Through.summary: Move when you reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points.

Long Haft Strike.summary: You can wield a long-handled weapon as a Double Weapon.

Relentless Attack.summary: Gain a bonus on attack rolls after missing a target.

Unswerving Resolve.summary: Whenever you resist a Fear or Mind-Affecting effect, you gain a temporary Force Point.

Deft Charge.summary: Take Swift Actions, Reactions, and Free Actions after you Charge before your turn ends.

Imperial Military Training.summary: Negate one Mind-Affecting effect per encounter.

Moving Target.summary: Gain a bonus to Reflex Defense when you remain mobile.

Prime Shot.summary: Gain a bonus to attack rolls when closer to your target than your allies.

Rapid Reaction.summary: React twice to the same trigger once per encounter.

Rebel Military Training.summary: Gain a dodge bonus to Reflex Defense when using Running Attack.

Recovering Surge.summary: Move up the Condition Track when you catch a Second Wind.

Unstoppable Combatant.summary: Catch more than one Second Wind in an encounter.

Vehicular Surge.summary: Once per day, gain Bonus Hit Points for a Vehicle you Pilot.

Vitality Surge.summary: Catch a Second Wind even when not at or below half Hit Points.

Bantha Herder.summary: Move a target damaged by your attack.

Battering Attack.summary: Knock an opponent Prone when you use Bantha Rush.

Destructive Force.summary: Deal damage to adjacent targets when you damage objects and Vehicles.

Disabler.summary: Gain benefits when using certain Ion weapons.

Dive for Cover.summary: Jump for Cover as a Reaction.

Fight Through Pain.summary: Use your Will Defense to determine your Damage Threshold.

Force of Personality.summary: Use Wisdom or Charisma to determine Will Defense.

Fortifying Recovery.summary: Gain Bonus Hit Points when you Recover.

Mission Specialist.summary: Grant bonus to allies' Untrained Skill Checks with a particular Skill.

Never Surrender.summary: Make an Endurance check to prevent falling to 0 Hit Points.

Officer Candidacy Training.summary: Gain a bonus to your Rank and Privilege Score.

Opportunistic Shooter.summary: Gain a bonus to Attacks of Opportunity with ranged weapons.

Pistoleer.summary: Gain benefits when using certain Pistols.

Predictive Defense.summary: Use Dexterity or Intelligence to determine Reflex Defense.

Riflemaster.summary: Gain benefits when using certain Rifles.

Risk Taker.summary: Improve your chances of success with Climb or Jump checks.

Sport Hunter.summary: Gain benefits with certain slugthrowers and sporting weapons.

Steadying Position.summary: Deny target's Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense when you are Prone and Aiming.

Aiming Accuracy.summary: After aiming as a Full-Round Action, gain a +5 on next weapon attack.

Damage Conversion.summary: Take additional Hit Point damage instead of moving down the Condition Track.

Distracting Droid.summary: Attempt to deny enemies within 6 squares their next Move Action, with a chance to make enemies Flat-Footed.

Droid Focus.summary: +1 bonus to certain Skills and Defenses when dealing with a selected class of Droid.

Droid Shield Mastery.summary: Automatically Recharge Shields in two Swift Actions.

Erratic Target.summary: Reduce Speed by up to 2 squares to increase dodge bonus to Reflex Defense.

Ion Shielding.summary: Move only -1 step on Condition Track when Ion damage exceeds Damage Threshold.

Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap.summary: Swap a Trained Skill for an Untrained Skill on the fly.

Mechanical Martial Arts.summary: Give an enemy a -5 penalty on attack and damage rolls for one round after striking it in Unarmed combat.

Multi-Targeting.summary: You can spread your Aim action across multiple consecutive rounds.

Pincer.summary: Maintain Pin feat and make subsequent Grapple checks as a Swift Action.

Pinpoint Accuracy.summary: Move target -1 step on the Condition Track when you hit with Aiming Accuracy.

Sensor Link.summary: Share sensor data instantly with an ally.

Shield Surge.summary: Trade Vehicle's Shield Rating for damage taken.

Slammer.summary: Double Strength bonus to damage rolls on this special melee attack.

Tool Frenzy.summary: Gain +2 to attack rolls and damage rolls with nonweapon Appendages in exchange for a -2 penalty to Reflex Defense.

Turn and Burn.summary: Withdraw by clearing threatened squares in up to 2 squares of movement, move your Speed when using the Withdraw Action.

Bone Crusher.summary: Move damaged Grappled opponent -1 step on the Condition Track.

Brilliant Defense.summary: Add your Intelligence bonus to your Reflex Defense as a Reaction.

Channel Rage.summary: Instead of Raging, gain +5 to Will Defense.

Cut the Red Tape.summary: Use Knowledge (Bureaucracy) in place of Gather Information.

Demoralizing Strike.summary: Make an Intimidation check when you deal damage with an Attack of Opportunity.

Disturbing Presence.summary: Make a Deception check to move through a Threatened Area without provoking Attacks of Opportunity.

Expert Briber.summary: Reduce the time and cost of Bribery attempts.

Flèche.summary: When Charging, turn any natural attack roll of 17+ into a Critical Hit.

Grazing Shot.summary: Strike two targets in direct line of sight, dealing half damage to each.

Hobbling Strike.summary: Reduce the target's Speed instead of dealing damage.

Improved Opportunistic Trickery.summary: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to reduce target's Reflex Defense by 5.

Indomitable Personality.summary: Add your Charisma bonus to your Will Defense as a Reaction.

Master of Disguise.summary: Gain +5 to creating a Deceptive Appearance or a Forged Document, and reduce the penalty for rushing.

Meat Shield.summary: Gain Cover bonus equal to opponent's Cover bonus.

Opportunistic Trickery.summary: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to reduce target's Reflex Defense by 2.

Recurring Success.summary: Gain extra use of a 1/encounter Talent or Feat.

Resolute Stance.summary: Gain +2 or +5 to Will Defense when you Fight Defensively.

Sadistic Strike.summary: Move opponents -1 step on the Condition Track when you deliver a Coup de Grace.

Silver Tongue.summary: Intimidate a creature or change its Attitude as a Standard Action.

Skill Challenge: Catastrophic Avoidance.summary: Catastrophic Failures in a Skill Challenge occur less frequently, and with milder results.

Skill Challenge: Last Resort.summary: Reroll a third failed Skill Check during a Skill Challenge, keeping the better result.

Skill Challenge: Recovery.summary: Treat a Skill Challenge as if it had the Recovery effect.

Stand Tall.summary: When you take damage, nearby allies attack your attacker.

Wookiee Grip.summary: Wield two-handed weapons in a single hand.

Acrobatic Ally.summary: Hoist or toss an ally of your size or smaller up to 2 squares.

Acrobatic Dodge.summary: When a melee attack misses you, move into an adjacent square without provoking an Attack of Opportunity.

Combat Trickery.summary: Spend two Swift Actions to make Deception check to make enemy Flat-Footed.

Elder's Knowledge.summary: Substitute a Knowledge (Social Sciences) or Knowledge (Galactic Lore) skill check for a Wisdom-related Skill Check.

Frightening Cleave.summary: When you use the Cleave feat, each enemy within 6 squares and line of sight takes a penalty to Reflex Defense, Skill Checks, and attack rolls against you.

Grab Back.summary: As a Reaction, make a Grab or Grapple attack following a failed Grab or Grapple attack made against you.

Halt.summary: Knock an enemy Prone after a successful Attack of Opportunity, immediately end the target's remaining Actions when also exceeding its Damage Threshold.

Heavy Hitter.summary: Add +1 point of damage for every 5 points rolled above the target's Reflex Defense, plus additional benefits when you exceed the target's Damage Threshold.

Hold Together.summary: Delay the damage caused to a Vehicle until the end of the round.

Hyperblazer.summary: Cut all calculation time and Use Computer penalties by half when making Use Computer checks for Astrogation in the Hyperspace tangle.

Improved Sleight of Hand.summary: Use Deception to aid your Stealth check to use Sleight of Hand; use Stealth to draw and palm a weapon simultaneously.

Improvised Weapon Mastery.summary: Treat Improvised Weapons as Simple Weapons, deal +1d6 points of damage.

Instinctive Attack.summary: Spend a Force Point to reroll an attack and take the better result.

Instinctive Defense.summary: Spend a Force Point to increase all Defenses by +2 for 1 round.

Intimidator.summary: When you successfully Intimidate, enemy takes -5 to Skill Checks and -2 to attack for one round.

Maniacal Charge.summary: Intimidate your enemies when Charging, preventing adjacent characters from making Attacks of Opportunity and denying your target its Dexterity bonus.

Nikto Survival.summary: Reroll Survival checks in native environment.

Targeted Area.summary: Deal an additional 5 points of damage against one target within a successful Area Attack.

Trample.summary: When using the Mounted Charge Action, attack enemies between you and your target.

Wilderness First Aid.summary: Use basic Survival skills as if you have a Medpac for Treat Injury checks.

Dreadful Countenance.summary: Marked as Sith, your appearance inspires awe, dread, and fear in all who view it.

Rapid Assault.summary: Through focus and raw determination, you can make multiple attacks even after moving.
